hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Built for faster replies and clearer communication across brand collaboration, procurement planning, and market execution.

intro: For partnerships, sourcing inquiries, or channel expansion, reach out directly to the Dunhua business team and we will respond with tailored support.
address: Shop I, No. 5 Shek Pai Tau Road, Tuen Mun, Hong Kong

methods.title: Choose the best way to reach us
methods.description: Whether you prefer email, phone, instant messaging, or social media, we have a direct channel ready for you.

email.title: Business Email
email.description: Best for partnership decks, quotation requests, and formal business communication.

phone.title: Phone Call
phone.description: Best for quick confirmations, follow-ups, and urgent coordination.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Best for real-time cross-region messaging and faster project alignment.

x.title: X / Twitter
x.description: Stay connected on social and reach out while following the latest brand updates.

details.title: Business details
details.description: If you need complete company contact details, you can also reach us through the channels below.

cta.title: Need a faster first reply?
cta.description: Start with WhatsApp or X for a quicker first touchpoint with our team.

form.name: Name
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again later.
